title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb discusses Huawei's announcement of a Tau Scaling Law designed to advance China's semiconductor capabilities amid US-China hardware competition. The video examines the role of EUV and DUV lithography, as well as packaging and logic folding techniques, in closing the technological gap.
